1.name: Village
1.description: A small settlement where heroes can heal wounds, recruit village units, or plunder for cards at the cost of reputation.

2.name: Monastery
2.description: A sacred place offering healing, advanced actions for purchase, and monastery unit recruitment. Can be burned for an artifact, but at a steep reputation cost.

3.name: Keep
3.description: A fortified stronghold defended by grey enemies. Once conquered, the owner can recruit keep units and draw an extra card when starting a turn nearby.

4.name: Mage Tower
4.description: A fortified tower guarded by violet enemies. Once conquered, the owner can recruit units and buy spells with influence and matching mana.

5.name: Dungeon
5.description: A dark underground lair where night rules always apply. Fight a brown enemy without unit support, then roll for a spell or artifact reward.

6.name: Tomb
6.description: An ancient burial ground with a powerful red enemy. Night rules always apply and units cannot help. Victory grants both a spell and an artifact.

7.name: Ancient Ruins
7.description: Mysterious ruins with a yellow token encounter. Pay 3 mana of the shown color to use the altar for 7 Fame, or fight the enemies revealed instead.

8.name: Monster Den
8.description: A lair hiding a brown enemy. Defeat it to earn random mana crystals by rolling the mana die twice.

9.name: Spawning Grounds
9.description: A dangerous area with two brown enemies. Full victory grants an artifact and 3 random mana crystals. Partial defeats leave remaining enemies in place.

10.name: Crystal Mine
10.description: A source of raw mana. End your turn here to gain 1 mana crystal of the mine's color.

11.name: Magical Glade
11.description: A place of natural magic. Discard a wound when ending your turn here. During the day, gain gold mana; at night, gain black mana when starting your turn here.

12.name: City
12.description: A heavily fortified settlement with multiple defenders and city bonuses. Once conquered, the leader can recruit units, buy items, and draw extra cards when nearby.

13.name: Portal
13.description: The starting location for players entering the map.
